name: 99 Acquisition Group Inc. Class A Common Stock
summary: 99 Acquisition Group Inc. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is based in New York, NY. They seek to focus their search on target businesses in the consumer and retail sectors, including those that are consumer-facing brands and platforms.
